name: Novisto ESG Data Management API
what_it_does: Novisto REST API for enterprise ESG data management and sustainability reporting platform. Enables AI agents to manage ESG KPI data collection and validation workflow automation, handle multi-framework mapping for GRI, SASB, TCFD, UN SDGs, and CSRD compliance, access stakeholder materiality assessment and prioritization data, retrieve ESG disclosure compilation and report automation for investor and regulatory reporting, manage data quality workflow and source documentation for audit trail, handle ESG goal-setting and progress tracking against targets, access board and management ESG dashboard data retrieval, retrieve comparable ESG benchmark and peer analysis data, manage third-party ESG rating preparation for MSCI, ISS, and Sustainalytics, and integrate ESG performance data with ERP, HR, and operational systems.
use_cases: Collecting ESG KPIs from business unit reporting agents
Mapping data to GRI and CSRD frameworks from regulatory reporting agents
Preparing ESG rating questionnaires from investor relations agents
Tracking sustainability goals from executive reporting agents
not_for: Environmental operational monitoring without ESG disclosure and investor reporting focus
Carbon accounting without multi-framework ESG KPI management
Consumer sustainability without enterprise investor-grade ESG reporting
best_when: A corporate sustainability team using Novisto wants AI agents to automate ESG data collection, multi-framework mapping, investor reporting, regulatory disclosure, and ESG rating preparation.
avoid_when: DISCLOSURE RISK: ESG data for investor disclosure must be auditable and accurate — automated data collection must include validation and source documentation. CSRD and SEC climate rules require assurance; automated disclosures need external auditor review. Materiality assessment automation cannot replace stakeholder engagement process requirements.

auth.notes: Novisto uses OAuth 2.0 authentication. Per-organization API credentials. Developer documentation at novisto.com. No native webhooks — polling-based data retrieval. Multi-framework ESG mapping engine. Audit trail and data lineage for regulatory assurance. Montreal, Canada-based company. Acquired by MSCI (2023).

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; organization size and reporting frameworks determine pricing
pricing.notes: Montreal, Canada. Founded 2019. Acquired by MSCI (2023). ESG data management market. MSCI portfolio company (ESG ratings and analytics leader). Multi-framework ESG reporting platform. CSRD and SEC climate disclosure modules. Integration with MSCI ESG ratings data. Competes with Workiva and Sphera for enterprise ESG reporting platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: DISCLOSURE RISK: Investor-grade ESG disclosures require external assurance; automated data collection must include validation, source documentation, and audit trail for auditor review
MSCI acquisition — Novisto acquired by MSCI (2023); product and API roadmap evolving with MSCI ESG data integration; verify current API availability
Framework mapping complexity — mapping same metric to GRI, SASB, TCFD, and CSRD requires understanding framework-specific calculation and boundary requirements
CSRD compliance — EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive has complex double materiality requirements; automated materiality assessment cannot replace stakeholder engagement
Audit trail requirement — all data changes must maintain source documentation for external assurance; automated updates without source attribution fail assurance requirements
No webhooks — implement scheduled polling for ESG data refresh; data collection follows reporting cycle (quarterly, annual) rather than real-time events
agent_readiness.security_notes: ESG data management. SOC2, GDPR, CSRD. OAuth2. CA/US/EU. Corporate ESG and sustainability data.

security_score_components.security_notes: ESG reporting. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. CA/US/EU. Corporate sustainability and ESG data.
